source_match.notes: Metadata identity matches source bundle: AP Physics 1: Algebra-Based Course and Exam Description, Effective Fall 2024, College Board. Checksum and local archive ref recorded.

source_traceability.notes: All high-impact conclusions map to page-map references. Page references use printed/footer page numbers with documented physical offset.

topic_tree.notes: 8 units plus Science Practices topic cover all Course at a Glance topics from p.17-19. topic_id stable and unique within skill. Scope/out_of_scope present. AP Physics 2 and calculus-based exclusions reflected.

assessment_model.notes: Section I/Section II structure, science practices/skills, FRQ question styles, difficulty ladder, confidence thresholds, command words reference and generation_constraints all present. lesson_use correctly disabled for v1.

out_of_scope.notes: Out-of-scope rules clear. Examples include AP Physics 2 electrostatics and calculus-based derivations.

examples.notes: 3 correct classification, 2 misclassification, 2 out-of-scope, 1 cross-topic examples provided. Meets minimum requirement for classification use.

portability.notes: No platform-specific dependencies. SKILL.md and templates do not mention EduFlow, Feishu, ClaudeTeam or any runtime.

p2.issue: retrieved_at is 'unknown'; should be recorded when official source is re-downloaded or confirmed.
Science practice weightings are not expressed as exact qualification percentages in the CED; left null. Consider adding approximate MCQ/FRQ skill ranges if available.
Page references use printed page numbers with variable physical offset. Machine consumers may need an explicit physical_page_offset field for automation.
